title: Create Stuff & Netherite Additions
description: This mod adds endgame variants of the Jetpack and Exoskeleton from Create Stuff & Additions.
body:
Netherite Exoskeleton ![Exoskeleton Back](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/231362f137dbe6f572ada6dbdaccdc76ae81f76b.png) ![Exoskeleton Front](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/024502b070f44d16f195d9c94e687c45dfeef775.png)
Netherite Jetpack ![Jetpack Back](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90261abbb323e0cc8835f088960c56f8bddbbbd4.png) ![Jetpack Front](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11233b577c4b6631a7fc51f4d3c71bbf1fa6d606.png)
Recipes ![Exoskeleton Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d32b31956de0795b20f929e48beee42c8a4ad81a.png) ![Jetpack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f12d6467a4c39802743b9b15eae2592f0914ca.png) ![Nether Engine Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3724c191fab9d8e20ef1756bf370345bba104525.png) ![Flywheel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/313a6f7dace304098177c1290764aee541c0767e.png)
This mod adds endgame variants of the Jetpack and Exoskeleton from [Create Stuff & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions) by FurtiTwo. The netherite variants have the same stats as a normal netherite chestplate. ***[CreateSA](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) are required for this mod to work.**
This mod can freely be used in any modpack. PLEASE REPORT BUGS IN THE [CURSEFORGE-COMMENTS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-netherite-additions/comments) OR ON MY [DISCORD SERVER](https://discord.gg/aYycXd9XeJ) This mod is also available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-netherite-additions)
